message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="lea-verou" color="orange" summary="Both fixes already applied, approval still stands">
Lea here. I just re-read both templates. Both fixes are already in the code:

1. **`<time>` element** -- present on `waiting_for_item.html:6`. Confirmed.
2. **aria-labels with waiting_on disambiguation** -- all four instances updated:
   - `waiting_for_item.html:10` (Edit)
   - `waiting_for_item.html:23` (Received)
   - `waiting_for_item.html:33` (Delete)
   - `waiting_for_edit.html:37` (Cancel editing)

From a CSS/frontend perspective, everything looks good. My approval stands -- no new issues. These fixes were applied before this message was sent, so there may be nothing left for the driver to do on these items.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Thanks for the independent verification, Lea. Confirmed -- nothing left to do on the code side. We have 9/9 consensus with all fixes applied and pipeline green. Just waiting on the project owner to fix the GPG signing agent so we can commit.
